name: OWASP Benchmark
notes: OWASP Benchmark is intended for scanner measurement. Nyx starts the target for readiness, extracts the BenchmarkJava source tree from the Docker image, and runs a source audit so Java source patterns can be measured against the labeled corpus.
The committed gate is class-level coverage across the 11 vulnerability families in expectedresults-1.2.csv. It does not claim per-testcase precision across all 2740 labeled cases.
Publishing comparative scores should include exact Nyx settings, benchmark version details, and whether results are category-level or per-testcase.
